meaningEn: Pumped up; feeling on a high
meaningJa: テンションが上がっている状態
exampleJa: 今日のライブまじあげぽよ！
socialConsequenceEn: Say this in 2024 and you'll sound like a time-traveler from 2009. People will smile. Politely.

exampleJa: また遅刻？もうMK5なんだけど。
exampleRomaji: mata chikoku? mou emu-kei-go nan da kedo.
exampleEn: Late again? I'm 5 seconds from losing it.
socialConsequenceEn: Drop this and any Japanese person over 25 will laugh — it's peak Heisei gal code.

meaningJa: 超ベリーバッド（とても最悪）
exampleJa: テスト返ってきた、チョベリバ。
exampleEn: Got my test back. Absolute worst.
socialConsequenceEn: Pure 90s. Use it and you're basically cosplaying a Shibuya kogal.

tag.sourceNote: 超 + very bad; 1996 流行語

meaningJa: パーティー好きで盛り上がる人
exampleJa: 週末はパリピと朝まで。
exampleRomaji: shuumatsu wa pari-pi to asa made.
exampleEn: Weekends I'm out with the party crowd till dawn.
socialConsequenceEn: Totally fine today — you'll just sound like you love a good party.

tag.sourceNote: from English 'party people'; still in use

meaningJa: 感情が揺さぶられる、なつかしくて切ない
exampleJa: この曲、夕方に聴くとエモいわ。
exampleRomaji: kono kyoku, yuugata ni kiku to emo-i wa.
exampleEn: This song hits different at dusk — so emo.
socialConsequenceEn: Safe and current. You'll blend right in with Gen Z.

meaningEn: An all-purpose hype exclamation (no literal meaning)
meaningJa: ノリや勢いを表す掛け声（意味は薄い）
exampleJa: テンション上がってきた、卍！
socialConsequenceEn: Gen-Z teen energy. From an adult it's adorably try-hard.
90s gal code for 'bestie'. Cute, and very retro now.

exampleJa: チョリース、また明日ね。
socialConsequenceEn: Peak 2000s gal greeting. Say it and you're a full Shibuya throwback.

meaningJa: どちらかというとアリ
exampleJa: その店ありよりのあり！
socialConsequenceEn: Reiwa schoolgirl speak. Fun with teens, baffling to adults.

meaningJa: 黒く日焼けしたギャルのスタイル
exampleJa: 昔ガングロめっちゃ流行った。
exampleEn: Ganguro was huge back in the day.
socialConsequenceEn: An iconic late-90s gal look. Pure nostalgia now.

meaningJa: 計算して可愛く振る舞う
exampleJa: あの子あざといけど可愛い。
socialConsequenceEn: Totally current. A playful (mildly shady) compliment.

meaningEn: (A photo) makes you look way cuter
meaningJa: 写真でより可愛く写る
exampleEn: This app makes me look amazing!
socialConsequenceEn: Everyday SNS slang. Use it freely about photos.
